videos.headline: Coco Azema picks off Wisconsin in the first quarter
videos.description: Braedyn Locke throws a poor ball over the middle and it's intercepted by Northwestern's Coco Azema.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coco Azema picks off Wisconsin in the first quarter) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Braedyn Locke keeps it and scores the Wisconsin TD
videos.description: Wisconsin scores the opening touchdown as quarterback Braedyn Locke keeps it and runs it in for a score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Braedyn Locke keeps it and scores the Wisconsin TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin turns a fumble into a TD late in the first half
videos.description: Wisconsin recovers a fumble inside the 5-yard line and turns it into a Cade Yacamelli touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wisconsin turns a fumble into a TD late in the first half) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Northwestern gets the turnover as they knock it loose from the QB
videos.description: Northwestern picks up the turnover as they recover the fumble in Wisconsin territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Northwestern gets the turnover as they knock it loose from the QB) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Braedyn Locke finds Tucker Ashcraft for a short TD
videos.description: Wisconsin extends its lead as Braedyn Locke finds Tucker Ashcraft at the goal line for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Braedyn Locke finds Tucker Ashcraft for a short TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Wisconsin sacks the QB in the end zone for a safety
videos.description: Wisconsin gets a safety as they sack the quarterback in the end zone.
